## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue/bug fix. Include motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue reference)

## Type of Change

Please delete options that are not relevant.

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Refactoring (internal cleanup without template behavior changes)
- [ ] Documentation update

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the code style and formatting rules of this project.
- [ ] I have run `npm run typecheck` and compiled successfully.
- [ ] I have run `npm run build` and tested the CLI commands locally.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation accordingly (or checked that it remains accurate).
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or console errors.

## Additional Screenshots/Context

Add any media files, visual comparisons, or terminal outputs if relevant.
